Laura E. Fannon, Esq. of KELLY, HERLIHY & KLEIN LLP 951-0535 for defendant MIDLAND LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY moving for summary judgment

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- Plaintiff's motion for summary judgment -- denied. Plaintiff not entitled to relief as a matter of law. Re knowledge of seriousness of condition beased on these questions. Triable issue of fact exists re knowledge of condition. (JJM/cw) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
